description: Remove a Tag from a Project by specifying its `tag_instance_id`. A successful response returns the removed Tag Instance UUID.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: tag_instance_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the tag instance

schema.description: Response schema for a single Tag Instance ID.

id.description: UUID representing the applied Tag Instance.
